<think>
We are given the structure of NetworkPacket and PacketInfo.
 We are to use the Hexi library to deserialize the packet.

 Steps for deserialize_packet:
 1. Create a buffer_adaptor from the input buffer.
 2. Read the packet_id (uint32_t) using the read function.
 3. Read the username using the prefixed adaptor (which reads a length-prefixed string).
 4. Read the score count (uint32_t) and then use read_container to read the scores vector.
 5. Read the metadata as a null-terminated string using the null_terminated adaptor.

struct PaddedData {
    uint16_t header;
    std::string data;
    uint32_t footer;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_with_padding(const PaddedData& packet) {
    // Create a buffer to hold the data
    Hexi::VectorBuffer buffer;

    // Create a binary stream using the buffer
    Hexi::BinaryStream stream(buffer);

    // Write the header
    stream << packet.header;

    // Write the data (which will write the length prefix and then the string)
    stream << packet.data;

    // Write 16 bytes of padding (0x00)
    stream.fill<16>(0x00);

    // Write the footer
    stream << packet.footer;

    // Now, extract the data from the buffer and return it as a vector
    return buffer.data();
}

#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <hexi/endian.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <string>
#include <span>

struct MeasurementData {
    uint32_t sensor_id;
    std::vector<float> temperatures;
    double pressure;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) const {
        // Serialization: write the fields
        adaptor.write(sensor_id);
        for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
            auto converted = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(temp, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
            adaptor.write(converted);
        }
        auto converted_pressure = hexi::endian::conditional_reverse(pressure, std::endian::native, std::endian::little);
        adaptor.write(converted_pressure);
    }
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        // Deserialization: read the fields
        adaptor.read(sensor_id);
        for (auto& temp : temperatures) {
            adaptor.read(temp);
            hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(temp);
        }
        adaptor.read(pressure);
        hexi::endian::little_to_native_inplace(pressure);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_measurement_data(const MeasurementData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    stream.serialise(data);
    return buffer;
}

MeasurementData deserialize_measurement_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    MeasurementData data;
    stream.deserialise(data);
    return data;
}

struct SensorInfo {

    std::string_view sensor_name;
};

SensorInfo extract_sensor_info(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    SensorInfo info;
    
    info.sensor_name = stream.view();
    stream.enforce_read_bounds(sizeof(uint32_t));
    stream.read(&info.sensor_id);
    stream.skip(stream.size());
    
    return info;
}
